title: Expire cart reservations on a timer
description: Hold reserved stock only for a bounded window so abandoned carts release inventory back to the pool.
body: Use when add-to-cart reserves stock before payment completes. Do not hold a reservation indefinitely — abandoned carts then pin inventory that no one will buy, starving real demand. Actions: attach a TTL to each reservation, release it back to available on expiry or explicit cart abandonment, and re-validate availability at the payment step. Validation signals include reserved stock returning to the available pool after the window and no orphaned holds. Risk boundary: a reservation that expires mid-checkout can oversell on the retry — re-reserve atomically at payment rather than trusting the earlier hold.
